name: Library Bridge
summary: The four bridge layers that give any AI automatic access to the full AI Skills Library without manual context injection. Use when setting up a new AI…
description: The four bridge layers that give any AI automatic access to the full AI Skills Library without manual context injection. Use when setting up a new AI integration, asking "how do I connect the library to an AI", "make this AI use the library automatically", "auto-possess this AI", "what's the MCP config", "how do I inject the library as a system prompt", "connect the brain to any AI".
author: marvelousempire
goal: Any AI — Claude, GPT, Gemini, or anything else — gets the full library as its operating brain on startup with zero manual injection.
